description.en: Immediately terminates the worker. This does not let worker finish its operations; it is halted at once.ServiceWorkerinstances do not support this method.

excerpt.es: Immediately terminates the worker. This does not let worker finish its operations; it is halted at once.ServiceWorkerinstances do not support this method.
excerpt.en: Immediately terminates the worker. This does not let worker finish its operations; it is halted at once.ServiceWorkerinstances do not support this method.

description.en: Returns a string containing the serializedURLfor the worker's location. It is a synonym forWorkerLocation.href.

excerpt.es: Returns a string containing the serializedURLfor the worker's location. It is a synonym forWorkerLocation.href.
excerpt.en: Returns a string containing the serializedURLfor the worker's location. It is a synonym forWorkerLocation.href.

description.en: Returns theTrustedTypePolicyFactoryobject associated with the global object, providing the entry point for using theTrusted Types API.

excerpt.es: Returns theTrustedTypePolicyFactoryobject associated with the global object, providing the entry point for using theTrusted Types API.
excerpt.en: Returns theTrustedTypePolicyFactoryobject associated with the global object, providing the entry point for using theTrusted Types API.
